'''valuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceanothus|ceanothus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceanothus|ceanothus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| valuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælizith|vælizith]] || [[word:vælizij|vælizij]] || [[word:vælizish|vælizish]] || [[word:vælizi|vælizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:valuluzuth|valuluzuth]] || [[word:valuluzuj|valuluzuj]] || [[word:valuluzush|valuluzush]] || [[word:valuluzu|valuluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:valuzuth|valuzuth]] || [[word:valuzuj|valuzuj]] || [[word:valuzush|valuzush]] || [[word:valuzu|valuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:valufzuth|valufzuth]] || [[word:valufzuj|valufzuj]] || [[word:valufzush|valufzush]] || [[word:valufzuf|valufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valuzuthu|valuzuthu]] || [[word:valuzuju|valuzuju]] || [[word:valuzushu|valuzushu]] || [[word:valuzuku|valuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valuzuth|valuzuth]] || [[word:valuzuj|valuzuj]] || [[word:valuzush|valuzush]] || [[word:valuzu|valuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valuzuthul|valuzuthul]] || [[word:valuzujul|valuzujul]] || [[word:valuzushul|valuzushul]] || [[word:valuzukul|valuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valuzuthuthu|valuzuthuthu]] || [[word:valuzujuju|valuzujuju]] || [[word:valuzushushu|valuzushushu]] || [[word:valuzuku|valuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valuzuthun|valuzuthun]] || [[word:valuzujun|valuzujun]] || [[word:valuzushun|valuzushun]] || [[word:valuzukun|valuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valuzuthuoro|valuzuthuoro]] || [[word:valuzujuoro|valuzujuoro]] || [[word:valuzushuoro|valuzushuoro]] || [[word:valuzukuoro|valuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
